channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: Trump Extends Iran Deadline for Strait of Hormuz Deal
item.description:
President Trump granted Iran a 24-hour extension to reach an agreement on reopening the Strait of Hormuz, warning that U.S. airstrikes on Iranian power infrastructure will follow if negotiations collapse by Tuesday night.

Key points:
• Trump posted "Tuesday, 8:00 P.M. Eastern Time!" on Truth Social, signaling the revised deadline — the third time he has pushed back his ultimatum since first issuing it on March 21.
• The original Monday deadline stemmed from a 10-day pause Trump announced on March 26, citing ongoing indirect talks mediated by Pakistan, Egypt, and Turkey.
• Iran has rejected the ultimatum, with its UN mission calling Trump's threats "clear evidence of intent to commit a war crime," while vowing retaliatory strikes on regional oil and civilian infrastructure if its own sites are targeted.
• Indirect negotiations are being led by Vice President Vance and Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, with White House envoy Steve Witkoff and foreign ministers of Pakistan, Turkey, and Egypt also involved — though no significant breakthrough has been reported.

Read the full article: Trump Extends Iran Deadline for Strait of Hormuz Deal

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
